name: Prismatic Fog
why: Rainbow haze — full spectrum + max bloom creates ghost colors dispersing through the space. Demonstrates bloom's atmospheric potential.

name: Amber Lantern
why: Warm lantern-in-fog effect. Extreme bloom wraps amber light into soft aureoles. Geometric forms visible through bloom give the light a source shape.

name: Dark Jewel Box
why: Deep-sea luminescence. Dark angular shapes frame the luminous center with scattered gem-like light points. Intimate jewel-box feel.

name: Abyssal Green
why: Dark angular shapes in foreground create sense of looking into deep water. Green holds vividly at lum=0.08. Seed a0 deepest abyssal framing.

name: Night Bloom
why: Dreamy moonlit rose. lum=0.12 + bloom=0.80 creates the most atmospheric config in the set. Seed a13 adds asymmetric void = night, bright rose = bloom.

name: Shadow Lattice
why: Wide web of fine silvery lines against darkness. Most seed-sensitive config tested — arrangement dominates character when color is achromatic.

name: Night Amber
why: Deep firelight in darkness. Warm golden aureole through bloom. Seed a0 gives widest atmospheric spread with scattered sparkles.

name: Night Violet
why: The project's signature violet in the dark bloom corner. Seed a5 gives widest atmospheric spread with dark geometric framing creating depth.

name: Dense Orbital Teal
why: Icy crystalline cluster. Seed a0 gives widest orbital distribution — flow=1.0 distributes 339 dense nodes into readable ring-like patterns.

name: Night Trifold
why: Night recipe + trifold division. Seed a13 shows most visible three-way spatial split through purple atmospheric haze.

name: Ember Scatter
why: Dying embers in darkness. Sparse amber chaos with soft bloom halos. Less frenetic than Turbulent Ember — contemplative warmth from chaos.

name: Night Coral
why: Deep warm golden-red atmospheric glow. Seed a13 gives visible geometric facets with warm coral light. Fills the warmest Night family corner.

name: Chaotic Sapphire
why: Dramatic dark geometric shapes with sapphire light emanating through. Seed a13 creates depth and framing. Purple accents add spectral interest.

name: Turbulent Ember
why: Warm scattered amber sparks. Seed a9 has widest scatter with the most kinetic energy — multiple bright points create firefly effect.

name: Dark Crystal
why: Vertical crystalline monolith from darkness. Same parameters as Shadow Lattice, different seed — validates that in achromatic-dark space, the seed IS the artwork. Seed a9 confirmed best.

name: Chartreuse Night
why: The breakthrough green survives in darkness. Deep emerald atmospheric haze — Night Bloom's green sibling.

name: Achromatic Veil
why: Third achromatic-dark variant — angular lattice trailing downward. Three configs, same parameters, three distinct artworks. Seed a17 confirmed best.

name: Chartreuse Storm
why: Angular green shards with kinetic energy. Tempest's green cousin — low coherence scatters geometry while chartreuse makes each shard glow electric.

name: Flow Transition (Amber)
why: Warm golden tones with visible curving lines. Seed a17 shows flow=0.60 transition quality most clearly.

name: Night Sapphire
why: Deep blue-purple bloom against darkness. More mysterious than Night Bloom. Dark bloom recipe at blue = stunning.

name: Dusty Rose
why: Widest gossamer spread with the most delicate, quiet quality. Muted pink is beautifully understated with geometric facets barely visible through haze.

name: Antique Bronze
why: Genuinely evokes aged metal. Very low chroma (0.18) at amber creates patina/sepia quality. Seed a9 confirmed — wide atmospheric fog with half-hidden forms.

name: Pewter
why: Elegant silvery neutrality. Seed a5 shows widest metallic web — most 'pewter vessel' surface texture.

name: Saffron Burst
why: Focused sparkle point radiating outward. Seed a17 captures the 'burst' quality best. Rich warm saffron glow.

name: Chartreuse Current
why: Breakthrough vibrant lime green at hue=0.30. Seed a5 adds dynamic asymmetry — darkness makes the green luminous.

name: Atmospheric Silk
why: Vast smooth gossamer purple. Seed a0 gives widest ethereal spread. scale=1.0 + faceting=0.0 + bloom.

name: Chaotic Blades
why: Most scattered distribution — separated angular teal fragments in crystalline disorder. Seed a0 gives widest blade spread.

name: Orbital Night Rose
why: Night recipe + orbital flow. Seed a0 gives widest atmospheric spread with visible orbital ring structures through pink-purple haze.

name: Solitude
why: One sparse violet presence against vast darkness. d=0.02. Extremely seed-stable — all 5 variants identical.

name: Night Garden
why: Rich emerald green with atmospheric bloom. Lush and verdant — the most vivid of the dark bloom family.

name: Meditation
why: Genuine contemplative stillness. Sparse, achromatic, scattered starlike dots. Seed-stable — original was already best.

name: Tempest
why: Turbulent teal-green angular energy sweeping horizontally. Seed a0 creates the widest storm sweep — the most kinetic config.

name: Dissolution
why: Two bright clusters splitting apart with fragments between — strongest 'falling apart' reading. Seed a0 creates most dramatic separation.

name: Sharp Radial Burst
why: Brilliant sapphire crystal starburst with angular dark planes framing the composition. faceting=1.0 + flow=0.0 creates maximum radial sharpness. Seed a17 gives most dramatic contrast.

name: Bright Vivid Coral
why: Pure vivid energy — lum=0.85 + chroma=0.90 at coral creates the brightest warm composition. Seed a9 gives most intense centered radiance with visible geometric faces.

name: Grand Cathedral
why: Vast crystalline purple architecture. scale=0.90 + high faceting + bloom creates wide spread of angular planes with sparkle. Seed a0 gives widest, most 'grand' composition.

name: Fractured Bloom
why: Dramatic shattered magenta-pink light. fracture=0.95 + bloom=0.80 creates two bright focal points with sharp angular shards radiating between them. Seed a13 gives sharpest shard geometry.

name: Smooth Orbital Rose
why: Silk ribbons spiraling in rose. faceting=0.05 + flow=1.0 creates the smoothest orbital composition. Warm pink-rose center with flowing atmospheric spread. Seed a9 gives most cohesive luminosity.
